languages.text: {n}Солдаты 32-го меровского героически отправились на верную гибель. Мечом и прометием они истребляли Погонщиц, несмотря на сокрушительные потери среди своих братьев и сестер. Скоро твари сбавили натиск на человеческие поселения, отправившись зализывать раны. Великими жертвами Зарков выиграл себе передышку.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Солдаты 32-го меровского героически отправились на верную гибель. Мечом и прометием они истребляли Погонщиц, несмотря на сокрушительные потери среди своих братьев и сестер. Скоро твари сбавили натиск на человеческие поселения, отправившись зализывать раны. Великими жертвами Зарков выиграл себе передышку.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain deaths. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon the human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Солдаты 32-го меровского героически отправились на верную гибель. Мечом и прометием они истребляли Погонщиц, несмотря на сокрушительные потери среди своих братьев и сестер. Скоро твари сбавили натиск на человеческие поселения, отправившись зализывать раны. Великими жертвами Зарков выиграл себе передышку.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain death. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}

{n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

{n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

{n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain death. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}

{n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain deaths. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon the human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}

languages.text: {n}32番メロウ連隊は、数世紀ぶりに、自分たちの故郷と呼ぶこの残酷な世界に攻勢に出た。異種生物の牙を食い破り、多くの血を流して勝利を掴んだ。それは連隊にとって初めての勝利だった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 32番メロウ連隊は、数世紀ぶりに、自分たちの故郷と呼ぶこの残酷な世界に攻勢に出た。異種生物の牙を食い破り、多くの血を流して勝利を掴んだ。それは連隊にとって初めての勝利だった。

languages.text: {n}El 32.º regimiento de Merov marchó heroicamente hacia su muerte segura. Armados con espadas y prometio, los soldados purgaron a los Pastores sin prestar atención a las brutales pérdidas de sus hermanos y hermanas. Poco después, el asalto incansable de las criaturas llegó a su fin y se retiraron a sus guaridas. Por un precio terrible, Zarkov había conseguido un respiro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain deaths. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon the human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El 32.º regimiento de Merov marchó heroicamente hacia su muerte segura. Armados con espadas y prometio, los soldados purgaron a los Pastores sin prestar atención a las brutales pérdidas de sus hermanos y hermanas. Poco después, el asalto incansable de las criaturas llegó a su fin y se retiraron a sus guaridas. Por un precio terrible, Zarkov había conseguido un respiro.{/n}

languages.text: {n}梅罗夫第32团英勇地踏上了有去无回的征途。他们手持刀剑和钷素，不顾战友的接连倒下，奋力清剿拒生花。不久之后，那些怪物对人类定居点的攻势终于减弱，退回了巢穴。扎尔科夫以惨痛的代价换来了片刻喘息。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain deaths. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon the human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}梅罗夫第32团英勇地踏上了有去无回的征途。他们手持刀剑和钷素，不顾战友的接连倒下，奋力清剿拒生花。不久之后，那些怪物对人类定居点的攻势终于减弱，退回了巢穴。扎尔科夫以惨痛的代价换来了片刻喘息。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das 32. Merov-Regiment marschierte heldenhaft in den sicheren Tod. Mit Schwertern und Promethium bewaffnet, verbrannte es die Treiber ungeachtet der verheerenden Verluste unter seinen Brüdern und Schwestern. Bald darauf ebbte der Ansturm der Kreaturen auf die Siedlungen der Menschen ab und sie zogen sich in ihre Verstecke zurück. Für einen schrecklichen Preis hatte sich Zarkov eine Atempause verschafft.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain deaths. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon the human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}

Mit Schwertern und Promethium bewaffnet, verbrannte es die Treiber ungeachtet der verheerenden Verluste unter seinen Brüdern und Schwestern. Bald darauf ebbte der Ansturm der Kreaturen auf die Siedlungen der Menschen ab und sie zogen sich in ihre Verstecke zurück. Für einen schrecklichen Preis hatte sich Zarkov eine Atempause verschafft.{/n}

languages.text: {n}32. Merov Alayı, kahramanca kesin ölümlerine yürüdü. Kılıç ve prometyumla donanıp kardeşleri arasındaki ezici kayıpları umursamadan Çobanları temizlediler. Çok geçmeden yaratıkların insan yerleşimlerine yönelik saldırıları azaldı ve inlerine çekildiler. Korkunç bir bedel ödese de Zarkov, biraz olsun zaman kazanabildi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain deaths. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon the human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}32. Merov Alayı, kahramanca kesin ölümlerine yürüdü. Kılıç ve prometyumla donanıp kardeşleri arasındaki ezici kayıpları umursamadan Çobanları temizlediler. Çok geçmeden yaratıkların insan yerleşimlerine yönelik saldırıları azaldı ve inlerine çekildiler. Korkunç bir bedel ödese de Zarkov, biraz olsun zaman kazanabildi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le 32e régiment de Merovm marcha la tête haute vers la mort. Armés d'épées et de prométhium, ces hommes et femmes anéantirent les Chasseurs, sans se laisser abattre par les pertes terribles que subirent leurs rangs. Peu après, les assauts sur les colonies humaines ralentirent et les créatures se replièrent dans leurs antres. Zarkov paya un coût terrible, mais accorda à son peuple un répit bien mérité.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The 32nd Merov Regiment heroically marched to their certain deaths. Armed with sword and promethium, they purged the Drovers, heedless of the crushing losses among their brothers and sisters. Before long, the creatures' onslaught upon the human settlements waned, and they retreated to their lairs. At a terrible cost, Zarkov had bought itself a respite.{/n}
